pageDescription: Find and remove empty directories left behind by uninstalled programs
confirmRecycleDesc: {{count}} empty folders will be moved to the recycle bin.
confirmPermanentDesc: {{count}} empty folders will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
emptyDescription: No empty directories were found in the selected location.
idleDescription: Select a directory to scan for empty folders that can be safely removed.
protectedNote: System folders, user profile directories, and version control folders are automatically protected.
